title: Botanical Machinery Extra
body:
# Botanical Machinery Extra
This mod is an add-on to the [Botanical Machinery](https://modrinth.com/mod/botanical-machinery) (BM) mod. If it weren't for them, I wouldn't have created this mod. Big thanks to them!

Well, let's get started. This mod adds improved versions of mechanisms, its own sparks, mechanical orechilds, several improvements for these mechanisms, blocks, ingots and dragonstones.

It is worth noting that the main feature of this mod is the integration with [Applied Energistics 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2). By connecting the mechanisms to ME (by connecting the cable), it will be able to transmit channels (8), and it will also be possible to automatically unload the mechanism's inventory to ME. When connected, this mechanism will not consume channels, which simplifies their automation.

There are 4 tiers of each mechanism in total, they differ from the number of slots to improvements.

Now about the tiers:

- Base Tier (Malachite) 
- Upgraded Tier (Saffron)
- Advanced Tier (Shadow)
- Ultimate TIer (Crimson)
  
Let's talk about each tier separately, namely their statistics. (Basic values ​​from the config)

<details>
<summary>Malachite Tier</summary>
  
![malachite Tier](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa090a8d647859318e3a66b28941aaab6b8c5e92.png)

- Mana Storage **2.5M** 
- Water Storage **16B**
- Create **4 recipes** at a time
- Mana transfer **25k** (Spark)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Saffron Tier </summary>
  
![Saffron Tier](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3648b266902523d055e74f86aec49038501f74ee.png)

- Mana Storage **10M**
- Water Storage **32B**
- Create **8 recipes** at a time
- Mana transfer **100k** (Spark)
 
</details>


<details>
<summary>Shadow Tier </summary>
  
![Shadow Tier](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3e19c854bba1ef07d56fc27f315d7b1321572ab.png)

- Mana Storage **50M**
- Water Storage **64B**
- Create **16 recipes** at a time
- Mana transfer **500k** (Spark)
  
</details>


<details>
<summary>Crimson Tier </summary>
  
![Crimson Tier](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d5d1b27c821fb4a7af768367f2d551372a1b7d7.png)

- Mana Storage **100M**
- Water Storage **128B**
- Create **32 recipes** at a time
- Mana transfer **100M** (Spark) 

</details>


The following improvements are also added:

- Infinity **Mana**
- Infinity **LivingRock**
- Infinity **Water**
- Infinity **Seed**
- Infinity **Stone**
- **Speed**


<details>
<summary>Upgrades</summary>
  
![Image of improvements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6609a6065cdff732392bd0f1969a91e947fa72e4.png)

</details>


 

All values ​​can be easily changed in the mod configurations.

If you are creating a modpack, be sure to open the configuration data. Also some bugs from the main mod were fixed. I will be very happy if you use this mod and you like it very much. It is worth noting right away that if there are errors that are not in the original mod, I will try to fix them. But if the error is present in BM, then you should contact them first.

You can write all the errors to me on [github](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2)

Thank you for your attention and have a good time!
